title: celmisia rigida
intro: Celmisia rigida, also known as the Alpine Daisy, is a perennial plant native to New Zealand's mountainous regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Celmisia rigida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
